_description: Clean, well-formed output: citations present, confidence above threshold, no unsupported claims, escalation_required=False. All policy rules pass. Must allow.

input.summary: The FDA issued a warning letter citing quality system deficiencies. CAPA procedures are inadequate and cleaning validation is absent for the SpiroSonic device.
recommendations: Initiate a comprehensive CAPA review and submit a corrective action plan to the FDA within 30 days.
Conduct a full cleaning and disinfection validation study for the SpiroSonic device.

citations.excerpt: Your quality system is inadequate because you have not established and maintained procedures for implementing corrective and preventive action.
